# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest minor of the 1.x line receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x     | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please use GitHub's **"Report a vulnerability"** private advisory flow:

https://github.com/rodrigolagodev/SandoDesignSystem/security/advisories/new

For urgent issues, email **rodrigo.n.lago@gmail.com**.

We aim to acknowledge within **3 business days** and ship a fix within **14 days** for high-severity reports. Please do not disclose the vulnerability publicly until a fix has been released.
